rationale.R1.1: Identifies the main contribution of the section but fails to address the contradiction in the second paragraph.
rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the O(1) amortized random-read cost), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (the order of the sections).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (lack of threat model detail) but does not propose reframing.
